title: cacalia marginata
intro: Cacalia marginata, also known as Chinese artichoke or Candelilla, is a perennial plant native to Asia and Europe, characterized by its edible tubers and yellow daisy-like flowers. The tubers of the Cacalia marginata plant are known to possess medicinal properties, particularly for their inulin content, which acts as a prebiotic and helps regulate blood sugar levels. Consuming Cacalia marginata is believed to offer several health benefits, including aiding digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried tubers, tea, or capsules, allowing for different methods of consumption and utilization.
